sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check light gray path segments
seg = current_frame.segmentation
w_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w']
print(f"Light gray segments: {len(w_nodes)}")
for n in w_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
